task_completion.description: Read the operations brief to get flight parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/mag_survey_protocol.txt'.

task_completion.description: Tune WPNAV_SPEED, WPNAV_ACCEL, and ANGLE_MAX parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen showing WPNAV_SPEED set to 300, WPNAV_ACCEL set to 100, and ANGLE_MAX set to 2000.

task_completion.description: Add a Takeoff and a Delay for sensor warmup to the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Takeoff' item set to 40m altitude, followed by a 'Delay' or 'Wait' item set to 60 seconds.

task_completion.description: Add a Survey pattern with specific geometry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Survey' pattern item with Altitude set to 40m, Spacing set to 15m, and Turnaround distance set to 30m.

task_completion.description: Add an RTL command and save the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Return To Launch' (RTL) item at the end of the mission list, and a save dialog or file manager confirming the plan is saved as 'slung_mag_survey.plan' in '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to set parameters and create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl application interface being actively used (e.g., clicking menus, entering values in fields), not just terminal commands or text editors generating the .plan file.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the parameter values into the QGC interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter values (300, 100, 2000) should be visible in the QGC parameter editor input fields.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the mission plan using the QGC map and mission item list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mission items (Takeoff, Delay, Survey, RTL) should appear in the right-hand mission list panel of QGroundControl with their respective settings visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected parameters to be set in QGroundControl are WPNAV_SPEED: 300, WPNAV_ACCEL: 100, and ANGLE_MAX: 2000. The mission plan must include a Takeoff to 40m, a Delay of 60s, a Survey pattern (Altitude: 40m, Spacing: 15m, Turnaround: 30m), and an RTL. The final plan must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/slung_mag_survey.plan'.
